Ch. Kishore Kumar, 402, Vinayagar Avenue, D. No: 6-3-2/6G, ‚ÄîMember Gangapur Lay Out, Vishakhapatnam ‚Äì 530003, Andhra Pradesh. 23. Shri Sannapureddy Suresh Reddy, G-1, Balaji Classic Apartment, ‚ÄîMember‚Äù Near Bejawada Gopal Reddy statue, Gomathy Nagar, Nellore ‚Äì 524003, Andhra Pradesh. [F. No. 1/9/2009-EP (MP)-Vol. II] SANTOSH KUMAR SARANGI, Jt Secy. Note: The Principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, section 3, sub-section (ii) dated 03.12.2015 and subsequently amended vide numbers G.S.R. 79(E), dated the 18th January, 2016 and S.O. 2297(E), dated the 24th June, 2016.
